https://hg.mozilla.org/mozilla-central/r.commit_message:
Bug 1857812 - Message Popup to warn that editing password in login editor does not update it on the site. r=credential-management-reviewers,fluent-reviewers,bolsson,mtigley

Differential Revision: https://phabricator.services.mozilla.com/D192608

ranked_scenarios.summary: A hint message should be displayed when the "Website address" field is focused

description.text:
Created attachment 9089368
hint message.png

[Notes]:
- Based on the mock-up a hint message is displayed when the "Website address" field is focused.

[Affected Versions]:
- Nightly 70.0a1

[Affected Platforms]
- All Windows
- All Mac
- All Linux

[Steps to reproduce]:
1. Open the latest Nightly browser and navigate to "about:logins" page.
2. Click the "Create New Login" button.
3. Observe the  "Website address" field.

[Expected results]:
- The "Website address" field is focused and a hint message is displayed.

[Actual results]:
- The "Website address" field is focused but no hint message is displayed.

[Notes]:
- Attached a screenshot with the behavior from mock-ups.

ranked_scenarios.summary: Move Save/Cancel buttons to the same area where Edit/Remove buttons are
Add a border radius to the arrow box that appears when focusing the website url, in the Create New Login dialog
Make some common-shared.css styles easier to override.

description.text: This allows bug 1823943 to not use `!important` everywhere etc.

ranked_scenarios.summary: Replace action buttons in about:logins with reusable CommandButton component

description.text:
This issue is concerned with replacing all action buttons in about:logins with the new `CommandButton` component created in Bug 1810215.

This includes: 

* "Create new login" button
* Edit button
* Remove button 
* Copy button

ranked_scenarios.summary: Remove caching of login object on the login-list-items

description.text: With bug 1566115 we now have a map of guid -> {login, listItem} and as such we don't need to cache the login object on the listItem.

ranked_scenarios.summary: Keyboard navigation gets trapped in the Login Item

description.text:
Created attachment 9110252
Tabbing.mp4

[Affected versions]:
 - Latest Firefox Nightly 72.0a1 (Build ID: 20191120094758) (64-bit)
 - Firefox Beta 71.0b11 (Build ID: 20191118154140) (64-bit)

[Affected Platforms]:
 - Mac 10.14
 - Windows 10 x64
 - Arch Linux x64

[Prerequisites]:
 - Have a Firefox profile with at least one saved login.

[Steps to reproduce]:
1. Open the Firefox browser with the profile from prerequisites.
2. Navigate to the “about:logins” page.
3. Press the “Tab” key until all elements from the page are focused.
4. Repeat the previous step and observe the behavior.

[Expected result]:
 - All elements from the page are focused.

[Actual result]:
 - The focus remains trapped in the Login Item mode.

[Regression]
 -  The issue is not reproducible with older Nightly 71.0a1 builds. Considering this, using mozregression tool I have found the issue that broke this in the latest Nightly build. Here are the results:
 - Pushlog: https://tinyurl.com/y2benyvj
 - Last good revision: 263936aecc1dcd15f9dadbf4e41f7e7eebad29a6
 - First bad revision: ab46062892d418b37dbfa35fc3a61db5f7c9de59

[Additional Notes]: 
 - Attached a screen recording with the issue.
